description_long: This is a modern, belt-fed machine gun with a robust, tactical design, featuring a matte black metal body and a polymer adjustable stock. The weapon is equipped with an integrated bipod for stability during sustained fire, and a prominent optical sight is mounted on the top rail for enhanced targeting. The barrel is ribbed for heat dissipation and is fitted with a flash suppressor at the muzzle. A box-shaped ammunition container is attached beneath the receiver, feeding the belt into the action. The handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped, and the overall construction suggests durability and reliability for urban combat scenarios. The surface finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on metallic parts, and the weapon is detailed with visible screws, rails, and mechanical components.
description: A modern, belt-fed machine gun with a matte black finish, adjustable stock, integrated bipod, and mounted optical sight. Features include a ribbed barrel, box ammo feed, and ergonomic grips.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bipod legs extended, the ribbed barrel, and the flash suppressor at the muzzle.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the optical sight, box ammunition feed, adjustable stock, and detailed receiver components.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock, grip, and the alignment of the bipod and ammunition box.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the bipod, barrel, and additional details of the receiver and stock.
attribute_barrel_type: ribbed heavy barrel with flash suppressor
attribute_stock_design: telescoping adjustable polymer stock with textured buttpad
attribute_magazine_type: belt-fed with attached box ammunition container
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: folding rear aperture with fixed front post
